title: AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd:
AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
